creator: doconnor@ist.flinders.edu.au
text:
It appears that the dhclient program breaks, not the server itself.
I tested it under Win95 using the winipcfg.exe program, which allows you
to release and renew leases. Both the ISC and WIDE DHCP servers functioned
fine, although I only had one other machine to work with.
Using dhcpm(from the WIDE dist) showed the DHCP packets across the network..
Now all to figure out it why dhclient doesn't work :)
